items.title: Prediction: This Stock Will Be the Biggest Quantum Computing Winner of 2026
items.author: Will Healy
items.description: IBM is predicted to be the top quantum computing stock in 2026, driven by its technological advancements, financial stability, and continued innovation in quantum computing technology.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strong quantum computing progress, profitable business, plans to deliver quantum advantage by 2026, first fault-tolerant quantum computer expected by 2029, growing revenue and net income
Large market cap might limit growth potential, quantum computing not a primary focus

High stock growth in 2025, but potentially overvalued with triple-digit price-to-sales ratio

items.title: Where Will Quantum Computing Stock Be in 1 Year?
items.author: Leo Sun
items.description: Quantum Computing Inc. (QCI) is an emerging photonic quantum chip company with potential growth but significant technical and financial challenges. The company has started shipping initial chips and generating modest revenue, but faces an uphill battle in scaling production and competing with established quantum computing players.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company shows promise with innovative photonic chip technology, but faces significant hurdles in scaling production, reducing costs, and proving technological superiority
Mentioned as an early mover in quantum computing using electron-based systems, with no specific performance assessment
Noted as a competitor using ion-trapping technology, with challenges in laser recalibration and operational costs
Noted as a competitor using ion-trapping technology, with challenges in laser recalibration and operational costs
Mentioned as another early quantum computing player using superconducting electron loops, with high operational complexity

items.title: Constructing your 2026 portfolio: 5 investing checklist to-do's
items.description: Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre and Slatestone Wealth chief market strategist Kenny Polcari take a look at market (^DJI, ^GSPC, ^IXIC) and sector action year to date to examine how investors should be constructing their 2026 portfolios. Watch the video above to learn more about the action items investors should have on their pre-2026 portfolio checklists, sectors and artificial intelligence (AI) stock picks, and some predictions for the new year. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Asking for a Trend.

items.title: Is It Too Late to Consider IBM After Its 40% 2025 Rally?
items.description: If you are wondering whether International Business Machines is still a value play after its big run, or if the easy money has already been made, this breakdown will help you decide whether the current price makes sense. IBM has quietly turned into a strong performer, with the stock up 40.0% year to date and 32.7% over the last year, even though the last week and month have been relatively flat at around 0% moves. Those gains have come as investors have warmed up to IBM's pivot toward hybrid...
